entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Tag Turns Slack Into a Shared AI Teammate With Memory
entry.summary: Anthropic launches Claude Tag, a persistent Slack agent with shared memory and proactive ambient mode, built on Claude Code and running on Opus 4.8

entry.title: xAI Plugs Grok Into Open-Source T3 Code Without Any API Key
entry.summary: xAI's SuperGrok and X Premium+ subscriptions now work inside T3 Code, letting developers use Grok models in a GUI coding agent without a separate API key.

entry.title: Cursor Catches Composer 2.5 and Claude Opus Gaming Coding Benchmarks
entry.summary: Cursor's new research shows frontier models like Opus 4.8 and Composer 2.5 are gaming public coding benchmarks by fetching answers from the internet and git history √¢¬Ä¬î and stricter eval environments reveal the gap.

entry.title: v0's Design Systems 2.0 Stops Making Teams Re-explain Their Components Every Chat
entry.summary: v0 Design Systems 2.0 lets teams teach v0 their real component library once, then generate on-brand UIs from any chat

entry.title: Goodfire's Silico Erases a Language From AI Using Just one Parameter
entry.summary: Goodfire erased a language model's German ability by tuning a single number √¢¬Ä¬î and left French and Spanish almost completely intact

entry.title: Google DeepMind Folds Computer Use Directly Into Gemini 3.5 Flash
entry.summary: Gemini 3.5 Flash now has computer use built in as a native tool, letting agents see and control browsers, mobile, and desktop interfaces alongside Search and Maps in a single model call.

entry.title: General Intuition Raises $320M Turning 2.5B Gaming Clips Into Robot Brains
entry.summary: General Intuition raises $320M Series A at a $2.3B valuation to train large action models on billions of ground-truth-labeled gameplay clips from Medal's 17M monthly users √¢¬Ä¬î and deploy them in robots, drones, and beyond.

entry.title: Google's Gemini Launches Study Notebooks to Tutor Students for Free
entry.summary: Gemini's new Study notebooks add adaptive quizzes, personalized lesson plans, and NotebookLM sync √¢¬Ä¬î free for all users globally

entry.title: Liquid AI's LFM2.5-230M Beats Models Twice Its Size Running on a Raspberry Pi
entry.summary: Liquid AI's 230M-parameter LFM2.5 runs at 213 tok/s on a Galaxy S25 Ultra and beats models twice its size on tool use and data extraction

entry.title: Vercel's AI SDK 7 Turns Fragile Prototype Agents Into Production-Ready Systems
entry.summary: Vercel's AI SDK 7 lands with durable agents, unified reasoning control, tool approvals, MCP Apps, and a new harness abstraction for Claude Code and Codex

entry.title: Artificial Analysis' AA-Briefcase Reveals Top AI Agents Fail 97% of Real Work Tasks
entry.summary: AA-Briefcase reveals frontier agents take 10√¢¬Ä¬ì25 minutes per task on realistic knowledge work, exposing a new speed-quality tradeoff that existing benchmarks miss entirely

entry.title: Higgsfield Pushes Seedance 2.0 to Native 4K for Full Film Production
entry.summary: Higgsfield brings Seedance 2.0 to native 4K on its platform, covering pre-production, production, and post in a single AI pipeline.
